title: Chermown #2768
definition:
Hermon = "a sanctuary"

 1) a mountain on the northeastern border of Palestine and Lebanon and
    overlooking the border city of Dan
nasbUsage:
Definition: Hermon = "a sanctuary"

 1) a mountain on the northeastern border of Palestine and Lebanon and
    overlooking the border city of Dan

    NASB:  sacred (mountain), a mountain in S. Aram (Syria) and N. Isr.
